experiment: BH1 stage 3 — metric-blindness check (strict fixed-delta vs contrast-write)
verdict: METRIC ARTIFACT PROVEN: a policy that IS the oracle rule by construction (BC acc 0.97) scores 0.00 on the strict fixed-delta probe but 0.85 on the contrast-write probe, while the constant-dial control stays at 0.00. The strict E-28 probe is BLIND on saturated-belief step policies (fixed +0.2/+0.4 deltas never cross the threshold when bl sits near 0/1). Stage-1's flat fidelity curve is VOID as a reading of the Pressure Hypothesis; fidelity must be measured boundary-aware (contrast-write) alongside behavioral regime gap.
